question_text: Which statement about electric charges is correct?

options.label: A
options.text: Two positive charges repel each other

options.label: B
options.text: Two positive charges attract each other

options.label: C
options.text: A positive charge and a negative charge repel each other

explanation: Like charges (both positive or both negative) repel each other, while opposite charges (positive and negative) attract each other. This is a fundamental rule of static electricity.
